text_block_list.text:
Today is the Spring Fan Fest and the academy is
bustling with both students and fans.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Have you seen Gold Ship?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch! Where the heck did she go?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin, Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Damn! Bakushin O is also on the loose!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Geez. We've got to do something before this
devolves into pure chaos. Should we deal with
Gold Ship first, or—

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Outta the way! I'm running here! The main street
belongs to meeee!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Gaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's just doing whatever they want! Think
about the people who have to clean up after you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I should have never agreed to patrol.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
This is all the Empress's fault, always nagging
everyone and telling people to work harder.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
This is a total handful. There's no way I can
handle the plaza alone.
choice_data_list: Then, why not get some help?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right! Now, everyone get out there!

text_block_list.name: Miho Dormitory Students
text_block_list.text: Right! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'll deal with Turbo. I've received a lot of help
from the student council, after all.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Give me somethin' to do, Brian! I'll show ya what
I'm made of!

When I mentioned that Narita Brian needed some
help, there was no shortage of volunteers.
choice_data_list: They all want to help you, Brian.
They all want to help you, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Heh... It's not me they want to help. They just
want to help the student council.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Brian! What should I do?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Do whatever you want.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! C'mon, this is my big chance to work
with y—

text_block_list.name: Street Vendor Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Gyaaaaah! Ghost! There's a ghost wearing a
burlap sack!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch, sounds like Gold Ship! I'm going.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You come too! Stopping Gold Ship is no walk in
the park!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: R-right!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hold it right there, Gold Ship!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa, mitts off, Brian! This is my bag!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch! ...Well, I won't give you the time to enjoy it!
Vodka, 3 o'clock!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Darrrn yooou! I'll remember this!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hell yeah! Sayin' stuff like "3 o'clock!" is just way too cool!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hm. Thanks for the help, Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Um... Brian?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Could ya say that again? Say it just one more
time, please!

I get to see how much everyone adores Narita
Brian as the student council vice-president.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All right! What's next, Vice Prez?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Calm down. Enjoy the fact that nothing's happening.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it seems everyone's taken quite a liking to
you, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...President.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A little bird told me you've recruited some
students to assist with your duties.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Seeing you like this makes me proud. I'd love to
see you leading the student council one day.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Pass.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha, maybe one day.

After that, Narita Brian continues her work with
the help of the other students.
